steps.title: Identify what complete relative-size emphasis requires
steps.content:
To emphasize how two cities' populations compare relative to each other, you need both the raw numbers and meaningful context.

The notes provide absolute populations (Ulaanbaatar: 907,802; Hanoi: 7,781,631) and each city's share of its country (31.98% and 8.14%).

A full comparison uses both.

steps.title: Evaluate how each choice compares the two capitals
steps.content:
C makes the absolute size difference explicit with “is larger than,” then pivots to reveal the proportional contrast with “accounts for more of its country's population.” A and D merely list populations without emphasizing the comparison, and B focuses only on percentages without the direct size contrast.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
